title: Three Ways to Run Claude Code
description: A horizontal three-column comparison layout progressing left to right from least to most powerful. Each column represents one interface — Web, Desktop, Terminal — with an icon, a capability list, and a label indicating its power level. A directional arrow or gradient runs across the bottom reinforcing 'the further right, the more Claude can do.'

parts.title: Web vs. Desktop vs. Terminal
parts.description: Three side-by-side cards labeled Web, Desktop, and Terminal. Web card: zero setup, no filesystem access, browser icon. Desktop card: faster, better persistence, still limited, desktop app icon. Terminal card: full agentic power, filesystem, bash, MCP, subagents, terminal icon. A left-to-right arrow beneath all three cards labeled 'More Power →'.
